name: Caroline Herschel
tagline: First Woman to Discover a Comet
taglineCn: 第一位发现彗星的女性
bio: Caroline Herschel was the first woman to discover a comet, eventually finding eight comets and three nebulae over her career. Working alongside her brother William, she became the first woman to receive a salary as a scientist when King George III appointed her as William's astronomical assistant. She was also the first woman to receive honorary membership in the Royal Astronomical Society and to receive a Gold Medal of the Royal Astronomical Society.
bioCn: 卡罗琳·赫歇尔是第一位发现彗星的女性，在她的职业生涯中共发现了八颗彗星和三个星云。与兄弟威廉一起工作，当乔治三世国王任命她为威廉的天文助手时，她成为第一位获得科学家薪水的女性。她也是第一位获得皇家天文学会荣誉会员和皇家天文学会金奖的女性。
achievements: First woman to discover a comet
Discovered 8 comets and 3 nebulae
First woman paid as a scientist by the British Crown
achievementsCn: 第一位发现彗星的女性
发现8颗彗星和3个星云
第一位获英国王室科学家薪水的女性
references: Hoskin, Michael. The Herschel Partnership. Science History Publications, 2003.

name: Henrietta Swan Leavitt
tagline: Discovered How to Measure the Universe
taglineCn: 发现了测量宇宙的方法
bio: Henrietta Swan Leavitt discovered the period-luminosity relationship of Cepheid variable stars — the brighter the star, the longer its pulsation period. This relationship became the first 'standard candle' for measuring cosmic distances, enabling Edwin Hubble to prove that the universe extends far beyond our galaxy. Hired as one of the 'Harvard Computers' — women who catalogued stars for minimal pay — her discovery fundamentally changed our understanding of the scale of the universe.
bioCn: 亨丽埃塔·勒维特发现了造父变星的周光关系——恒星越亮，其脉动周期越长。这一关系成为测量宇宙距离的第一个'标准烛光'，使哈勃得以证明宇宙远远超出我们的银河系。她被聘为'哈佛计算员'之一——为微薄报酬编目恒星的女性——她的发现从根本上改变了我们对宇宙尺度的理解。
achievements: Discovered the period-luminosity relationship of Cepheid stars
Enabled measurement of cosmic distances
Made possible the discovery of the expanding universe
achievementsCn: 发现造父变星的周光关系
使宇宙距离的测量成为可能
使发现宇宙膨胀成为可能
references: Johnson, George. Miss Leavitt's Stars. W.W. Norton, 2005.

name: Annie Jump Cannon
tagline: Classified Nearly 400,000 Stars
taglineCn: 分类了近40万颗恒星
bio: Annie Jump Cannon developed the Harvard spectral classification system (OBAFGKM) still used by astronomers today to classify stars by temperature. She manually classified nearly 400,000 stars — more than any other person in history — earning her the nickname 'Census Taker of the Sky.' Nearly deaf from childhood, she was one of the famous 'Harvard Computers' and became the first woman to receive an honorary doctorate from Oxford University.
bioCn: 安妮·坎农开发了哈佛光谱分类系统（OBAFGKM），至今仍被天文学家用来按温度分类恒星。她手动分类了近40万颗恒星——比历史上任何人都多——因此被称为'天空的人口普查员'。她从小近乎失聪，是著名的'哈佛计算员'之一，成为第一位获得牛津大学荣誉博士学位的女性。
achievements: Developed the Harvard spectral classification system
Classified nearly 400,000 stars
First woman to receive an honorary doctorate from Oxford
achievementsCn: 开发哈佛光谱分类系统
分类近40万颗恒星
第一位获牛津大学荣誉博士学位的女性
references: Sobel, Dava. The Glass Universe. Viking, 2016.

name: Williamina Fleming
tagline: Discovered the Horsehead Nebula
taglineCn: 发现了马头星云
bio: Williamina Fleming was hired as a maid by astronomer Edward Pickering, who reportedly said his maid could do a better job than his male assistants. He was right. She became one of the first 'Harvard Computers' and developed a system for classifying stars by their spectra. She discovered the Horsehead Nebula, catalogued over 10,000 stars, and identified 59 gaseous nebulae, 310 variable stars, and 10 novae.
bioCn: 威廉明娜·弗莱明被天文学家爱德华·皮克林聘为女仆，据报道皮克林曾说他的女仆比他的男助手做得更好。他说对了。她成为最早的'哈佛计算员'之一，开发了一种通过光谱分类恒星的系统。她发现了马头星云，编目了超过10000颗恒星，鉴定了59个气体星云、310颗变星和10颗新星。
achievements: Discovered the Horsehead Nebula
Catalogued over 10,000 stars
Developed early stellar classification system
achievementsCn: 发现马头星云
编目超过10000颗恒星
开发早期恒星分类系统
references: Sobel, Dava. The Glass Universe. Viking, 2016.

name: Valentina Tereshkova
tagline: First Woman in Space
taglineCn: 第一位进入太空的女性
bio: Valentina Tereshkova became the first woman to fly in space on June 16, 1963, aboard Vostok 6. A former textile factory worker and amateur parachutist, she was selected from over 400 applicants for the Soviet cosmonaut program. She orbited Earth 48 times over nearly three days, logging more flight time than all American astronauts combined at that point. She remains the only woman to have completed a solo space mission.
bioCn: 瓦莲京娜·捷列什科娃于1963年6月16日乘坐东方6号飞船成为第一位飞入太空的女性。她曾是纺织厂工人和业余跳伞运动员，从400多名申请者中被选入苏联宇航员计划。她在近三天内绕地球飞行48圈，飞行时间超过了当时所有美国宇航员的总和。她至今仍是唯一一位完成独自太空任务的女性。
achievements: First woman in space (1963)
Orbited Earth 48 times in nearly 3 days
Only woman to have completed a solo space mission
achievementsCn: 第一位进入太空的女性（1963年）
在近3天内绕地球飞行48圈
唯一完成独自太空任务的女性
quote: Once you've been in space, you appreciate how small and fragile the Earth is.
quoteCn: 一旦你去过太空，就会体会到地球是多么渺小和脆弱。

name: Sally Ride
tagline: First American Woman in Space
taglineCn: 第一位进入太空的美国女性
bio: Sally Ride became the first American woman in space when she flew on the Space Shuttle Challenger in 1983 at age 32. A physicist with a PhD from Stanford, she operated the shuttle's robotic arm to deploy satellites. After leaving NASA, she became a physics professor and founded Sally Ride Science, a company creating educational programs to inspire young people — especially girls — in STEM fields.
bioCn: 萨莉·赖德于1983年32岁时乘坐挑战者号航天飞机成为第一位进入太空的美国女性。她拥有斯坦福大学物理学博士学位，操作航天飞机的机械臂部署卫星。离开NASA后，她成为物理学教授并创办了Sally Ride Science，一家创建教育项目以激励年轻人——特别是女孩——投身STEM领域的公司。
achievements: First American woman in space (1983)
Youngest American astronaut at the time
Founded Sally Ride Science for STEM education
achievementsCn: 第一位进入太空的美国女性（1983年）
当时最年轻的美国宇航员
创办Sally Ride Science推广STEM教育
quote: All adventures, especially into new territory, are scary.
quoteCn: 所有的冒险，尤其是进入新领域的冒险，都是令人恐惧的。
references: Sherr, Lynn. Sally Ride: America's First Woman in Space. Simon & Schuster, 2014.

name: Mae Jemison
tagline: First African-American Woman in Space
taglineCn: 第一位进入太空的非裔美国女性
bio: Mae Jemison became the first African-American woman to travel into space when she flew aboard Space Shuttle Endeavour in 1992. Before joining NASA, she earned degrees in chemical engineering and medicine, served in the Peace Corps as a medical officer in Sierra Leone, and worked as a general practitioner. After leaving NASA, she founded the 100 Year Starship project to make interstellar travel possible within a century.
bioCn: 梅·杰米森于1992年乘坐奋进号航天飞机成为第一位进入太空的非裔美国女性。在加入NASA之前，她获得了化学工程和医学学位，在塞拉利昂担任和平队医疗官，并从事全科医生工作。离开NASA后，她创立了100年星际飞船项目，旨在一个世纪内实现星际旅行。
achievements: First African-American woman in space (1992)
Engineer, physician, and astronaut
Founded 100 Year Starship project
achievementsCn: 第一位进入太空的非裔美国女性（1992年）
工程师、医生和宇航员
创立100年星际飞船项目
quote: Never limit yourself because of others' limited imagination; never limit others because of your own limited imagination.
quoteCn: 永远不要因为他人有限的想象力而限制自己；也永远不要因为自己有限的想象力而限制他人。
references: Jemison, Mae. Find Where the Wind Goes. Scholastic, 2001.

name: Liu Yang
tagline: First Chinese Woman in Space
taglineCn: 中国第一位女性宇航员
bio: Liu Yang became the first Chinese woman to travel to space in June 2012, aboard the Shenzhou 9 spacecraft. A former Air Force pilot with nearly 1,700 hours of flight experience, she was selected for China's astronaut program in 2010. She returned to space in 2022 aboard Shenzhou 14, serving as part of the crew that completed the assembly of the Tiangong space station.
bioCn: 刘洋于2012年6月乘坐神舟九号飞船成为中国第一位进入太空的女性。她曾是空军飞行员，拥有近1700小时的飞行经验，2010年被选入中国航天员计划。2022年她乘坐神舟十四号再次进入太空，作为完成天宫空间站组装的乘组成员。
achievements: First Chinese woman in space (2012)
Flew on both Shenzhou 9 and Shenzhou 14
Helped complete assembly of Tiangong space station
achievementsCn: 中国第一位进入太空的女性（2012年）
乘坐神舟九号和神舟十四号
帮助完成天宫空间站的组装

name: Peggy Whitson
tagline: Record-Setting Astronaut
taglineCn: 创纪录的宇航员
bio: Peggy Whitson holds the record for the most time spent in space by an American astronaut, accumulating 665 days across three missions. She was the first woman to command the International Space Station and the first female chief of the Astronaut Office at NASA. Growing up on a farm in Iowa, she watched the Apollo moon landings on television and decided to become an astronaut at age nine.
bioCn: 佩吉·惠特森保持着美国宇航员在太空停留时间最长的纪录，在三次任务中累计665天。她是第一位指挥国际空间站的女性，也是NASA宇航员办公室第一位女性负责人。她在爱荷华州的一个农场长大，在电视上观看了阿波罗登月任务，9岁时决定成为宇航员。
achievements: Most time in space by an American astronaut (665 days)
First woman to command the International Space Station
First female chief of NASA Astronaut Office
achievementsCn: 美国宇航员太空最长时间纪录（665天）
第一位指挥国际空间站的女性
NASA宇航员办公室第一位女性负责人

name: Carolyn Shoemaker
tagline: Discovered More Comets Than Any Living Person
taglineCn: 发现彗星数量超过任何在世者
bio: Carolyn Shoemaker discovered 32 comets and over 800 asteroids, more comets than any other living person at the time. She co-discovered Comet Shoemaker-Levy 9, which spectacularly crashed into Jupiter in 1994 — the first directly observed collision of two solar system objects. She began her career in astronomy at age 51, proving it is never too late to make world-changing discoveries.
bioCn: 卡罗琳·舒梅克发现了32颗彗星和800多颗小行星，当时发现的彗星数量超过任何在世者。她共同发现了舒梅克-列维9号彗星，1994年该彗星壮观地撞击了木星——这是第一次直接观测到的两个太阳系天体碰撞。她51岁才开始天文学职业生涯，证明了做出改变世界的发现永远不会太晚。
achievements: Discovered 32 comets — more than any living person at the time
Co-discovered Comet Shoemaker-Levy 9
Found over 800 asteroids
achievementsCn: 发现32颗彗星——当时超过任何在世者
共同发现舒梅克-列维9号彗星
发现800多颗小行星

name: Nancy Grace Roman
tagline: Mother of the Hubble Space Telescope
taglineCn: 哈勃太空望远镜之母
bio: Nancy Grace Roman was NASA's first chief of astronomy and is known as the 'Mother of the Hubble Space Telescope' for her pivotal role in planning and advocating for the observatory. She fought for years to secure funding and support for a space-based telescope, overcoming both technical skepticism and bureaucratic resistance. Her leadership laid the groundwork for one of the most transformative scientific instruments in history, which has reshaped our understanding of the universe since its launch in 1990.
bioCn: 南希·格蕾丝·罗曼是NASA首任天文学主管，因在哈勃太空望远镜的规划和推动中发挥关键作用而被誉为'哈勃太空望远镜之母'。她多年来争取资金和支持，克服了技术质疑和官僚阻力。她的领导为这一历史上最具变革性的科学仪器奠定了基础，自1990年发射以来，哈勃望远镜重塑了我们对宇宙的认知。
achievements: NASA's first chief of astronomy
Championed and planned the Hubble Space Telescope
Advanced space-based astronomical observation
achievementsCn: NASA首任天文学主管
推动并规划了哈勃太空望远镜
推进了太空天文观测事业
quote: I knew from the beginning that Hubble would be a great observatory.
quoteCn: 我从一开始就知道哈勃将会是一座伟大的天文台。
references: NASA biography: Nancy Grace Roman — https://www.nasa.gov/

name: Margaret Burbidge
tagline: Explained How Elements Are Forged in Stars
taglineCn: 揭示恒星中元素的形成机制
bio: Margaret Burbidge co-authored the landmark B²FH paper in 1957, which explained how chemical elements are synthesized inside stars through nuclear reactions — one of the most important papers in astrophysics. She became the first woman director of the Royal Greenwich Observatory and famously refused the Annie Jump Cannon Award because it was restricted to women, arguing against gender-segregated prizes. A tireless advocate for equality, she continued observing and publishing research well into her nineties.
bioCn: 玛格丽特·伯比奇于1957年参与撰写了具有里程碑意义的B²FH论文，解释了化学元素如何通过核反应在恒星内部合成——这是天体物理学中最重要的论文之一。她成为皇家格林尼治天文台的首位女性台长，并因拒绝接受仅限女性的安妮·坎农奖而闻名，她反对性别隔离的奖项。作为平等的不懈倡导者，她直到九十多岁仍在进行观测和发表研究。
achievements: Co-authored the B²FH paper on stellar nucleosynthesis
First woman director of the Royal Greenwich Observatory
Refused gender-segregated awards to advocate for equality
achievementsCn: 参与撰写关于恒星核合成的B²FH论文
皇家格林尼治天文台首位女性台长
拒绝性别隔离奖项以倡导平等
references: Burbidge, E.M. et al. 'Synthesis of the Elements in Stars,' Reviews of Modern Physics, 1957.

name: Jill Tarter
tagline: Pioneer of the Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence
taglineCn: 搜寻地外智慧生命的先驱
bio: Jill Tarter devoted her career to the scientific search for extraterrestrial intelligence, leading Project Phoenix and serving as longtime director of the SETI Institute's Center for SETI Research. She co-founded the SETI Institute and was instrumental in transforming the search for alien life from science fiction into rigorous science. Her work inspired Carl Sagan's novel Contact, and Jodie Foster's character in the 1997 film adaptation was based on her. She has received the TED Prize and numerous honors for her contributions to astronomy.
bioCn: 吉尔·塔特将职业生涯投入到科学搜寻地外智慧生命的事业中，领导了凤凰计划并长期担任SETI研究所SETI研究中心主任。她共同创建了SETI研究所，在将搜寻外星生命从科幻变为严谨科学方面发挥了关键作用。她的工作启发了卡尔·萨根的小说《接触》，1997年电影中朱迪·福斯特饰演的角色正是以她为原型。她获得了TED大奖和众多天文学荣誉。
achievements: Led SETI research for decades as director of the SETI Institute
Inspiration for the film Contact
Received the TED Prize for her work in astronomy
achievementsCn: 作为SETI研究所主任领导SETI研究数十年
电影《接触》的灵感来源
因天文学贡献获得TED大奖

name: Wang Yaping
tagline: First Chinese Woman to Perform a Spacewalk
taglineCn: 中国首位出舱活动的女航天员
bio: Wang Yaping is a Chinese astronaut and military pilot who became the first Chinese woman to perform a spacewalk during the Shenzhou-13 mission in 2021. She first flew to space aboard Shenzhou-10 in 2013, where she delivered China's first live space lecture to over 60 million students on Earth. She returned on Shenzhou-13 as a key crew member for the construction of the Tiangong space station, spending six months in orbit and conducting multiple extravehicular activities.
bioCn: 王亚平是中国航天员和军事飞行员，2021年在神舟十三号任务中成为中国首位进行出舱活动的女航天员。2013年她首次乘坐神舟十号飞入太空，向地面超过6000万名学生进行了中国首次太空授课。2021年她再次搭乘神舟十三号升空，作为核心乘组成员参与天宫空间站建设，在轨驻留六个月并完成多次出舱活动。
achievements: First Chinese woman to perform a spacewalk (2021)
Delivered China's first space lecture to 60 million students
Key participant in Tiangong space station construction
achievementsCn: 中国首位出舱活动的女航天员（2021年）
向6000万学生进行中国首次太空授课
参与天宫空间站建设的核心成员

name: Samantha Cristoforetti
nameCn: 萨曼莎·克里斯托弗雷蒂
tagline: First European Woman to Command the ISS
taglineCn: 首位指挥国际空间站的欧洲女性
bio: Samantha Cristoforetti is an Italian astronaut, fighter pilot, and engineer with the European Space Agency who became the first European woman to command the International Space Station in 2022. During her first mission in 2014–2015, she held the record for the longest single spaceflight by a woman at 199 days, a record later surpassed. She is widely recognized for her public outreach and efforts to inspire a new generation of European scientists and astronauts.
bioCn: 萨曼莎·克里斯托弗雷蒂是欧洲航天局的意大利航天员、战斗机飞行员和工程师，2022年成为首位指挥国际空间站的欧洲女性。在2014至2015年的首次任务中，她以199天创下女性单次太空飞行最长时间纪录（后被打破）。她因积极的公众科普工作和激励新一代欧洲科学家与航天员而广受认可。
achievements: First European woman to command the ISS (2022)
Held record for longest single spaceflight by a woman (199 days)
Fighter pilot, engineer, and ESA astronaut
achievementsCn: 首位指挥国际空间站的欧洲女性（2022年）
曾保持女性单次太空飞行最长时间纪录（199天）
战斗机飞行员、工程师和ESA航天员

name: Ruby Payne-Scott
tagline: Pioneer of Radio Astronomy
taglineCn: 射电天文学先驱
bio: Ruby Payne-Scott was a pioneer of radio astronomy, the first woman radio astronomer in Australia and one of the first in the world. She discovered Type I and Type III solar radio bursts, making fundamental contributions to our understanding of solar activity. She was forced to resign from CSIRO when her marriage was discovered, as married women were barred from holding permanent positions — a policy she had secretly defied for years to continue her research.
bioCn: 鲁比·佩恩-斯科特是射电天文学的先驱，也是澳大利亚第一位女性射电天文学家和世界上最早的女性射电天文学家之一。她发现了I型和III型太阳射电暴，对我们理解太阳活动做出了根本性贡献。当她的婚姻被发现后，她被迫从CSIRO辞职，因为已婚女性被禁止持有永久职位——她曾秘密违反这一政策多年以继续研究。
achievements: First woman radio astronomer in Australia
Discovered Type I and Type III solar radio bursts
Pioneer of radio astronomy and solar physics
achievementsCn: 澳大利亚第一位女性射电天文学家
发现I型和III型太阳射电暴
射电天文学和太阳物理学先驱

name: Paris Pişmiş
nationalityCn: 亚美尼亚裔土耳其-墨西哥人
tagline: First Professional Astronomer in Mexico
taglineCn: 墨西哥第一位专业天文学家
bio: Paris Pişmiş was the first professional astronomer in Mexico. Born in Istanbul to Armenian parents, she earned her PhD from Istanbul University and moved to Mexico in 1942, where she founded the astrophysics program at the National Autonomous University of Mexico (UNAM). Over her career, she discovered 20 open clusters and 3 globular clusters, and trained generations of Mexican astronomers who went on to build Mexico's modern astronomical research infrastructure.
bioCn: 帕丽斯·皮什米什是墨西哥第一位专业天文学家。她出生在伊斯坦布尔的一个亚美尼亚家庭，在伊斯坦布尔大学获得博士学位后于1942年移居墨西哥，在墨西哥国立自治大学（UNAM）创立了天体物理学项目。在她的职业生涯中，她发现了20个疏散星团和3个球状星团，并培养了几代墨西哥天文学家，他们后来建立了墨西哥现代天文研究基础设施。
achievements: First professional astronomer in Mexico
Founded the astrophysics program at UNAM
Discovered 20 open clusters and 3 globular clusters
achievementsCn: 墨西哥第一位专业天文学家
在墨西哥国立自治大学创立天体物理学项目
发现20个疏散星团和3个球状星团

name: Helen Sawyer Hogg
tagline: Cataloguer of Variable Stars in Globular Clusters
taglineCn: 球状星团变星编目者
bio: Helen Sawyer Hogg was an astronomer who catalogued variable stars in globular clusters, compiling comprehensive data that became essential references for astronomers worldwide. She wrote a weekly astronomy column for the Toronto Star newspaper for 30 years, making complex astronomical concepts accessible to the general public. She was the first woman president of several Canadian astronomical societies and received the Order of Canada for her contributions to science and public education.
bioCn: 海伦·索耶·霍格是一位天文学家，她对球状星团中的变星进行了编目，编纂的综合数据成为全球天文学家的重要参考资料。她为《多伦多星报》撰写了长达30年的每周天文学专栏，使复杂的天文学概念为普通大众所理解。她是多个加拿大天文学会的第一位女性主席，并因对科学和公众教育的贡献获得了加拿大勋章。
achievements: Catalogued variable stars in globular clusters
Wrote a weekly astronomy column for the Toronto Star for 30 years
First woman president of several Canadian astronomical societies
achievementsCn: 对球状星团中的变星进行编目
为《多伦多星报》撰写30年每周天文专栏
多个加拿大天文学会的第一位女性主席

name: Kathryn Sullivan
tagline: First American Woman to Walk in Space
taglineCn: 第一位太空行走的美国女性
bio: Kathryn Sullivan became the first American woman to walk in space on October 11, 1984, during the STS-41-G mission. She flew on three Space Shuttle missions and holds a PhD in geology. After leaving NASA, she served as Administrator of the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA). In 2020, she became the first woman to reach the deepest point in the ocean — Challenger Deep in the Mariana Trench — making her the first person to both walk in space and reach the ocean's deepest point.
bioCn: 凯瑟琳·沙利文于1984年10月11日在STS-41-G任务中成为第一位进行太空行走的美国女性。她参加了三次航天飞机任务，拥有地质学博士学位。离开NASA后，她担任了美国国家海洋和大气管理局（NOAA）局长。2020年，她成为第一位到达海洋最深处——马里亚纳海沟挑战者深渊——的女性，使她成为第一位既进行过太空行走又到达过海洋最深处的人。
achievements: First American woman to walk in space (1984)
First woman to reach Challenger Deep in the Mariana Trench (2020)
Served as NOAA Administrator
achievementsCn: 第一位太空行走的美国女性（1984年）
第一位到达马里亚纳海沟挑战者深渊的女性（2020年）
曾任美国国家海洋和大气管理局局长

name: Sunita Williams
tagline: Record-Setting Woman Spacewalker
taglineCn: 创纪录的女性太空行走者
bio: Sunita Williams is a NASA astronaut who has spent over 322 days in space across multiple missions. She held the record for most spacewalks by a woman (7) and most spacewalk time by a woman. A former US Navy test pilot, she has been a crew member on ISS Expeditions 14/15 and 32/33. Known for her endurance and skill, she also ran the first marathon in space during the 2007 Boston Marathon while aboard the International Space Station.
bioCn: 苏尼塔·威廉姆斯是一名NASA宇航员，在多次任务中累计在太空停留超过322天。她曾保持女性最多太空行走次数（7次）和女性最长太空行走时间的纪录。她是前美国海军试飞员，曾参加国际空间站第14/15次和第32/33次远征任务。她以耐力和技能闻名，还在2007年波士顿马拉松期间在国际空间站上完成了太空中的第一次马拉松。
achievements: Held record for most spacewalks by a woman (7)
Spent over 322 days in space across multiple missions
Ran the first marathon in space (Boston Marathon, 2007)
achievementsCn: 曾保持女性最多太空行走次数纪录（7次）
在多次任务中累计太空停留超过322天
在太空中完成第一次马拉松（2007年波士顿马拉松）
